name: Steamed Blueberry Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder and salt together.
2. Cut in shortening and add bread crumbs and sugar. Mix thoroughly.
3. Add egg and milk, mixing carefully.
4. Gently fold in blueberries.
5. Pour the batter into a greased mold.
6. Cover and steam for 2 hours.
7. Serve with any sweet pudding sauce.
